children.title: σ Selection
children.predicate: ((((p_partkey(#16) = l_partkey(#1)) AND (p_brand(#19) = "Brand#23")) AND (p_container(#22) = "MED BOX")) AND (l_quantity(#4) < SCALAR_SUBQUERY(@7)))

children.title: σ Selection
children.predicate: ((((p_partkey(#16) = l_partkey(#1)) AND (p_brand(#19) = "Brand#23")) AND (p_container(#22) = "MED BOX")) AND (l_quantity(#4) < Float64(0.2) * avg(lineitem.l_quantity)(#42)))

query:
select
        sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly
from
    lineitem,
    part
where
        p_partkey = l_partkey
  and p_brand = 'Brand#23'
  and p_container = 'MED BOX'
  and l_quantity < (
    select
            0.2 * avg(l_quantity)
    from
        lineitem
    where
            l_partkey = p_partkey
);
